name: tessera-docs-design
$note: Machine-readable projection of DOCS-DESIGN.md, compiled into hard failures by apps/docs/tests/design-lint.test.ts. Editing a pattern or allowIn is a design decision: update DOCS-DESIGN.md and this file together, with review. Never weaken the contract to make a build pass.

bannedPatterns.reason: Tokens only (§1.1): color values live in globals.css; app/layout.tsx carries the two viewport themeColor mirrors of --background
Both themes come from the same semantic tokens (§1.1); per-theme styling in components defeats the token architecture
Arbitrary color brackets bypass the token contract (§1.1)
Docs motion is CSS-only (§1.5, ADR-0054); no animation library on this surface
No 3D engines on public surfaces (MARKETING-DESIGN §0, inherited)
Theme state lives in lib/theme.tsx alone (§1.3); every switch must go through the radial ripple
Transitions declare specific properties (§4); transition-all animates surprises
No hardcoded domains (§3): cross-surface URLs come from lib/site.ts (NEXT_PUBLIC_*); the production domain is not yet decided
Tess appears only in the sanctioned placements (§5): the docs home and the 404 — never inside content, reference tables, or chrome
Docs prose is direct and honest (§6); no marketing superlatives

requiredPatterns.reason: The radial theme propagation (§4) must exist in the seam file — its silent removal is a design regression
Reduced motion means complete stillness for our own motion (§1.5)
Rose is the interactive voice through the fd seam (§2); losing the binding silently reverts the surface to fumadocs defaults
Keyboard focus is always visible (§1.7, WCAG 2.4.7)
